feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to make specific fields read-only in an Action Parameter Popup (Abstract Entity) - ABAP 8.16
entry.content:
​I am working in an ABAP Release 8.16 environment using the RAP (ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model).

​I have a requirement where a custom action button on the UI triggers a popup dialog. This popup uses a custom Abstract Entity to define its input parameter fields.

​My Requirement:

When the user clicks the action button and the custom abstract entity popup appears, only the "Quantity" field should be editable. Every other field in that structure needs to be read-only.

​Here is a simplified version of my Abstract Entity:

@EndUserText.label: 'Action Parameter Popup'

define abstract entity ZC_MyActionParameter

{

  @EndUserText.label: 'Material ID'

  MaterialID : matnr;

  

  @EndUserText.label: 'Desired Quantity'

  Quantity : kwmeng;

  

  @EndUserText.label: 'Plant'

  Plant : werks_d;

}

 

And here is how it's defined in my Behavior Definition (BDEF):

action MyCustomAction parameter ZC_MyActionParameter result [1] $self;

Currently tried creating bdef for abstract entity and make feild readonly but not working 

And try to use object readonly UI annotation but is not available in this release

entry.title: Regarding unexpected behavior in batch input for ME12
entry.content:
We are developing an add-on program for SAP S/4HANA.
We are using an add-on program for the mass maintenance of purchasing info records, but it is exhibiting strange behavior. I would appreciate your advice on the cause and potential solutions.

The screen operations were performed in the following order:

#1. Updated purchasing info record for vendor XXXX in ME12 (updated price) by manual.
#2. a few minutes later. Updated purchasing info record for vendor YYYY in ME12 (updated price) by manual
#3. a few minutes later.Attempted to update purchasing info records (prices) for multiple items for vendor ZZZZ using the mass maintenance add-on.

For the first data record in step #3, the following error appeared:
"Supplier differs from supplier XXXX from the info record"
(Message Class 06, Message No. 314)
This unexpected behavior resulted in an error involving a vendor that was not being used at all in step #3.
We have been unable to intentionally reproduce the issue (it seems to happen unpredictably).

I would appreciate your guidance regarding the cause and how to address this.
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to hide create invoice in J1IGSUBCON
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

The requirement is to disable or hide the Create Invoice button in J1IGSUBCON.

Advance Thanks,

entry.title: Restrict Project Creation in CJ20N to Project Templates Only and Prevent WBS Structure Changes After
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I have a business requirement in SAP Project System (PS), and I would appreciate your advice on the best standard solution or enhancement approach.

Requirement:

  1. Users should only be allowed to create new projects in CJ20N by copying from a predefined Project Template.
  2. Creating a project from scratch should not be allowed.
  3. After the project is copied from the template, users should be able to maintain project data (dates, responsible persons, etc.), but they should not be allowed to:
    • Add new WBS elements.
    • Delete existing WBS elements.
    • Change the project hierarchy/structure.

The objective is to ensure that every operational project follows the exact WBS structure defined in the project template.

entry.title: Fiori Myinbox make a field clickable(hyperlink)
entry.content:
In fiori my inbox for PO Flexible workflow we have visualization parameter

Can we add a field and make it clickable (hyperlink) to open a different fiori app in new tab ?
Or Can we make an existing field clickable (hyperlink) to open a different fiori app in new tab ?

Please guide

entry.title: SP01 Multiple Selection Adjacent rows not work
entry.content: I ran SP01 and obtained over 10,000 records. I want to select some to delete, but I cannot select multiple adjacent rows.

entry.title: SAP QM - How to Perform Partial Reversal of Usage Decision Stock Posting?
entry.content:
I'm working on a custom Z program in SAP QM to support the partial reversal of a stock posting after Usage Decision (UD), and I'd like to understand the standard SAP approach for this requirement.

Example:

  • Inspection Lot Quantity: 100 EA
  • Usage Decision has been completed.
  • Entire 100 EA is posted from Quality Inspection Stock to Unrestricted Stock using Movement Type 321.
  • Later, it is identified that only 30 EA needs to be reversed due to a quality issue.

Expected Result:

  • Reverse only 30 EA from Unrestricted Stock back to Quality Inspection Stock using Movement Type 322.
  • The remaining 70 EA should continue to remain in Unrestricted Stock.
  • The Usage Decision should remain valid, and only the stock posting should be corrected.

I would appreciate your guidance on the following:

  1. Does SAP standard support partial reversal of a stock posting created during Usage Decision, or is only complete reversal supported?
  2. Which standard Function Module, BAPI, or API is recommended for performing a partial 321 → 322 reversal in a custom Z program?
  3. After posting the 322 movement, are there any standard QM Function Modules that should be called to keep the inspection lot quantities and system statuses consistent?
  4. Is there any standard process to update the remaining accepted quantity after the partial reversal?
  5. Are there any SAP Notes, documentation, or best practices related to this scenario?

I'm looking for a standard SAP-compliant solution and would like to avoid direct updates to QM application tables.

entry.title: Update Processor through FIN_WF_AGENT BADI for Verify General Journal Entries Workflow
entry.content:
Hi Community Members,

I have implemented the BADI - FIN_WF_AGENT using the Custom Logic FIORI app in order to update the processor for Verify General Journal Entries workflow/

My requirement is to be able to dynamically assign processors for Verify General JE Workflow requests. I have a CBO where the list of approvers are maintained for each of the submitter (here submitter is the one who creates the JE using the Verify General JE FIORI app).

In the Manage Workflow for Verify General JE, we have added a deadline option which trigger after 1 minute of Step. And the initial recipient is another user (of type BP employee). This user (let's say USER_APRV) is also listed in the Manage Teams & Responsibilities FIORI app.

Now, when a new request is raised, initially the processor is set as USER_APRV. However, as the deadline callback class is triggered after 1 minute, the BADI implementation is also triggered and the processor gets updated. Inside the BADI the "old_agent" is replaced by the "new_agent".  Currently, the "new_agent" value is hard-coded. However, the requirement is that the "new_agent" should be determined by selecting the appropriate approver from the designated CBO based on the submitter of the request.

In the ABAP call stack, I can see that the method "if_swf_flex_ifs_run_appl_step~on_deadline_action_callback" of the class "CL_FDC_ACCDOC_VER_FLEX_RUN_APP" is being called and it contains the  workflow task id ("IV_TASK_WI_ID") as an importing parameter to the class. This task id can be used to query the CDS C_GLJRNLENTRYTOBEVERIFIED  to get the Journal entry detail along with the submitter.

Here comes the issue! Since the task id is an importing parameter and local to the class, I cannot read it using a dirty assignment technique. Also, I have using several other class-methods / Function modules to get the work-item id from the stack or the memory but nothing was successful.

If anyone has had such a requirement and was able to achieve this, it would be really helpful for me if you can share your insights.

Thank you,
Sayak

SAP Business Workflow  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Finance

entry.title: Enable barcode scanning for Product field (/SCWM/S_RF_SELECTION-RFPROD) in Stock/Bin query product
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to enable GS1/EAN128 barcode scanning for the Product field in the RF "Stock/Bin Query by Product" transaction.

Expectation - To scan a  barcode string containing Product and Batch information into the Product field. The application should then decode the barcode and populate the Product and Batch fields.

Current Scenario - The Product field refers to /SCWM/S_RF_SELECTION-RFPROD which has conversion exit. When a barcode string is longer than 40 characters, the value is truncated before further processing.

I checked for notes but did not found anything relating this.
2863559 - Error /SCWM/RF_EN195 by RF "Stock / Bin Query by Product" product barcode scan - this was closer but not of much help.

Is there any SAP Note, enhancement, or recommended standard approach to support this requirement? If not, is the recommended solution to create a custom RF program/screen with a barcode input field (without a conversion exit).

Any guidance or references to relevant SAP Notes would be appreciated.

Thank you.

Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: OData URL Decode Strategy (or delete duplicate $skiptoken)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

There is this problem where the $skiptoken is being incremented but not being cleared. 

Run sequence 1 --> ?$skiptoken=100
Run sequence 2 --> ?$skiptoken=100&$skiptoken=200
Run sequence 3 --> ?$skiptoken=100&$skiptoken=200&$skiptoken=300
Run sequence 4 --> ?$skiptoken=100&$skiptoken=200&$skiptoken=300&$skiptoken=400

This only happens when the the client queries multiple page. If there are more records, there is a *next* link containing the URL of the next page. Now, the URL being returned is encoded and has multiple $skiptoken each time it is run (as shown above).

This is true regardless if we run from SAP Gateway Client, Postman, web browser, and Workato (which is the actual production client).

To better demonstrate, please see below screen.

May I ask if there is a SAP standard solution for this? or if not, at least custom ABAP code in my web service. I tried to debug but the skiptoken only contains a numeric value. 

Because right now, my proposal is that the Workato peeps should do the URL decoding before using it for the next page. (Not quite sure if they are amenable to that)

entry.title: Issue with editing Classes in SAP GUI
entry.content: We tried editing SAP Custom Class and Methods imported from other systems in our S4 HANA 2025 systems in SAP GUI and it did not allow. However when we edited the same Class and methods in ADT Eclipse, it worked. More importantly after editing in ADT Eclipse we were able to re-edit this same custom class and interface in SAP GUI. We wanted to understand if there is anything can be done to fix this in SAP GUI

entry.title: S4 Advanced Returns Management - Logistical Follow-Up Actions
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Happy Friday. I need some guidance regarding SAP S/4HANA Advanced Returns Management (ARM).

In standard SAP, the Returns Overview for Customer Returns (transaction MSR_TRC_C) displays the standard follow-on material documents as Logistical Follow-Up Actions resulting from the inspection process (for example, blocked stock to unrestricted stock, blocked stock to returns stock, etc.).

In our scenario, however, the follow-on material documents are posted from decentralized EWM using non-standard processes (using Badi in EWM), such as:

  • Material-to-material transfer (movement types 309/343)
  • Immediate scrapping from blocked stock via PGI (movement type 555)

These postings create the corresponding material documents in S/4HANA.

The issue is that these material documents are not displayed as Logistical Follow-Up Actions in MSR_TRC_C. As a result, the processing status of the Logistical Follow-Up Actions remains yellow (Process Incomplete) instead of changing to green (Document Complete), even though the required material postings have been completed and the material documents properly link to the returns delivery/returns sales order.

We have thoroughly reviewed the standard ARM configuration but have not found any configuration option that supports this requirement.

Could you please advise whether there is a standard approach to achieve this functionality? Alternatively, are there any BAdIs, enhancement spots, implicit enhancements, or other extension points that could be used to populate the follow-on material documents and update the processing status accordingly?

Many thanks in advance for your assistance. If you need any additional information about our scenario, I would be happy to provide it.

 

Thanks,

MP

entry.title: Concurrency lock on TM transport order during mass approval from the 'My Inbox' Fiori app.
entry.content:
I am currently working on an approval workflow that processes records entered in the 'Transport Charges' node; this triggers a workflow that sends each entered value individually.
This means that each value has its own workitem and its own container.

The issue arises when a user selects multiple lines belonging to the same freight order in the Fiori 'My Inbox' app and performs a mass approval or rejection. Fiori begins processing them one by one; the first work item processes correctly but places a lock of type '/BOBF/S_LIB_ENQUEUE_NODE' on the freight order.
Consequently, when the second value attempts the same action, it finds the object locked by the first work item a pattern that repeats for all subsequent work items attempting to modify the same freight order.

  This is the problematic code snippet:

    IF lt_mod IS NOT INITIAL.
      lo_srv_mgr->modify(
        EXPORTING it_modification = lt_mod
        IMPORTING eo_change       = DATA(lo_change)
                  eo_message      = lo_message ).

      IF lo_change->has_failed_changes( ) = abap_false.
        lo_srv_mgr->do_action(
          EXPORTING
            iv_act_key           = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_action-root-calc_transportation_charges
            it_key               = lt_tor_root_key
          IMPORTING
            eo_change            = DATA(lo_act_change)
            eo_message           = DATA(lo_act_msg) ).

        IF lo_act_change IS BOUND AND lo_act_change->has_failed_changes( ) = abap_false.
          lo_tra->save( IMPORTING eo_message = lo_message ).
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF. " End lt_mod

I have already tried removing the 'optimistic' and 'exclusive' locks on the lock object '/BOBF/E_LIB_2' after processing was complete, allowing a couple of seconds to elapse using the function module 'DEQUEUE_/BOBF/E_LIB_2', but without success.
I would appreciate your help if any of you have encountered a similar scenario.

Thanks, and I hope you are all doing well.

entry.title: MiniSAP Portal down 24+ hours - blocking Developer Access Key for AS ABAP 7.52 trial
entry.content:
https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap I'm a student using the AS ABAP 7.52 SP04 Developer Edition trial for coursework.

The MiniSAP portal (https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap) has been showing
"experiencing an issue affecting availability" for over 24 hours now, which is blocking
me from generating a Developer Access Key to create custom objects (tables, programs).

My installation details:
- Hardware Key: Z0323381629
- Installation Number: INITIAL
- System: NPL

I've already filed support case [reference: MSG1223042888_a4SG2VpVOT189hIb4] but was told
CIC has limited visibility into MiniSAP's availability.

Has anyone else experienced this outage? Is there an ETA for MiniSAP being restored, or an
alternative way to register for the developer key while it's down?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: AS ABAP 7.xx SP04, Developer Edition - End of Life
entry.content:
Daar community,

The ABAP Sybase playground for learnign ABAP is going end of live, is there any option to extend the license at the moment?

The portal for the requests of the minisap licenses is not working at the moment.

Is SAP going to provide some sort of extensions in a different format?

 

Regards,

 

VG

entry.title: Subject: Can anyone help with recording Inspection Lot defects from an SE38 custom program
entry.content:
Subject: Can anyone help with recording Inspection Lot defects from an SE38 custom program ?

Hi Experts,

I am working on a custom ABAP report (SE38) for SAP QM.

My requirement is to perform a partial reversal of Usage Decision. The stock reversal part is already working successfully.

After the partial reversal, I need to record a manual defect against the Inspection Lot from the same custom report.

I investigated the standard SAP QM interface and found the function module QIRF_GET_DEFECT_ITEMS2. According to SAP QM-IDI documentation, this FM is used to confirm defect items using record types such as Q90 (Inspection Lot), Q91 (Operation), Q92 (Characteristic), Q95, and Q96.

I have also debugged the standard implementation and found that:

  • QIRF_GET_DEFECT_ITEMS2

  • → DEFECT_ITEM_RECORDING

  • → QFFE_DEFECT_ITEMS_GENER_LOT

I am populating the QMIFE structure and calling the FM from my SE38 report.

However, I currently cannot complete end-to-end testing because there is no QM inspection lot test data available in my DEV system.

My questions are:

  1. Is QIRF_GET_DEFECT_ITEMS2 the correct SAP-standard FM to record manual defects from a custom SE38 program?

  2. Has anyone successfully used this FM from a custom report (not from QE51N or another standard transaction)?

  3. For Inspection Lot defects (Q90), which QMIFE fields are mandatory?

  4. Is there any SAP-recommended alternative API/BAPI for this requirement?

Any sample code or working example would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: Custom Field Not Visible in FAGLL03H Report Output or Layout in PRD
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have extended transaction FAGLL03H by implementing the FAGL_LIB  BAdI (IF_FAGL_LIB~SELECT_DATA) to display a custom field in the report output.

Implementation Details

  • BAdI: FAGL_LIB
  • Method Implemented: IF_FAGL_LIB~SELECT_DATA
  • Custom field appended to:
    • SGLPOS_N_CT
    • SGLPOS_N_GL_CT

Issue

The enhancement is working as expected in both Development (DEV) and Quality (QAS) systems. The custom field is available in the report output and can also be added through the layout.

However, in the Production (PRD) system, the custom field is not available in the report output or in the layout field selection.

Analysis Performed

  • The append structures are present and active in SE11 in PRD.
  • The BAdI implementation is active in PRD.
  • The transport has been imported successfully.
  • During debugging in IF_FAGL_LIB~SELECT_DATA,  I observed that the custom field is not available in <ls_data> (LIKE LINE OF CT_DATA) or in CT_DATA. 
  • One difference I noticed is that transaction HDBVIES was not executed in PRD after transporting the enhancement, although it is mentioned as a post-transport step in the SAP documentation/blog for extending FAGLL03H.

Queries

  1. Could the absence of the custom field in CT_DATA be due to HDBVIEWS not being executed in PRD?
  2. Is executing HDBVIEWS mandatory after appending custom fields to SGLPOS_N_CT and SGLPOS_N_GL_CT?
  3. Is it sufficient to regenerate only the relevant HDB views, or is it necessary to regenerate all HDB views?
  4. If all HDB views are regenerated in the Production system, is there any risk of impacting existing custom developments or standard reports?
  5. Are there any additional activation or post-transport steps that should be performed to make the custom field available in FAGLL03H?

I would appreciate any suggestions or guidance from anyone who has encountered a similar issue.

Thank you.

entry.title: License Portal Down - Urgent Renewal for AS ABAP 7.52 Dev Edition (NPL)
entry.content:
Hi the SAP Community,

I am currently using the SAP AS ABAP 7.52 Developer Edition (MiniSAP), and my license is going to expire very soon on July 17.

I am trying to renew it, but the official license portal (go.support.sap.com/minisap) is currently down and showing an error message.

 

I already contacted the Customer Interaction Center (CIC), but since I am a free user without S-User authorizations, they told me they could not process a standard support case for me.

Could you please advise on how free users can renew their license keys during this portal downtime, or let us know when it might be back online?

My System ID is NPL - SAP NetWeaver 7.x (Sybase ASE).
(For privacy and security reasons, I have omitted my Hardware Key here, but I can provide it via private message if you are able to generate a key for me).

Thank you so much for your support!

Best regards,
Kunihiro Nakano

entry.title: Repeated RAP update of business partner is causing error
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm trying to update tax numbers of business partners using RAP. It is working if there is a single update. If multiple updates I'm trying each with its own commit then the following error is coming.

Parameter IV_X_SAVE is '' for FM BUPA_CENTRAL_CHANGE. It should be 'A'.

Anyone faced this error. Any solution for this.

Aravind

entry.title: VA01 vertical scrollbar visible only after horizontal scrolling
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using an SAP test system based on Global Bike as part of my studies. I noticed a usability issue in transaction VA01.

When the SAP GUI window is maximized, the right-side vertical scrollbar is visible and the bottom horizontal scrollbar is not needed. However, when the window is reduced, the bottom horizontal scrollbar appears and the vertical scrollbars move to the far right side.

I have also seen a case in another S/4HANA system where these scrollbars were displayed even when the SAP GUI window was maximized. In that case, the user had to move the bottom horizontal scrollbar to the right in order to access the vertical scrollbar. After doing this, the left part of the screen was cut off and fields/tabs such as Order Reason were no longer visible.

This is not convenient when creating sales orders where the Order Reason field needs to be used, because the user has to scroll horizontally just to access the vertical scrollbar, and then loses visibility of the left side of the screen.

I checked a similar VA01 layout in SE51. The main screen was SAPMV45A / 4001,  and the lower area was defined as SUBSCREEN_BODY.

My questions are:

  1. From a technical point of view, can this behaviour be changed by adjusting the dynpro/subscreen layout in SE51/SE80?
  2. Is the scrollbar position controlled by the width/position of the lower subscreen area, for example SUBSCREEN_BODY?
  3. Or is the scrollbar position fully controlled by SAP GUI / standard SAP screen behaviour?
  4. Why does the screen not adjust to the available SAP GUI window size in the same way as in the old SAP system?

I understand that changing SAPMV45A  would be a standard modification, but I would like to understand what technically controls the position of this vertical scrollbar and why the screen does not resize in the same way as in the legacy SAP system.

If this is not the correct board, please advise where this SAP GUI / dynpro layout question should be posted.

 

Thank you.
